description_long: This sculpture features a classical-style bust of a young male figure rendered in white stone or plaster, mounted atop a rectangular, horizontally-grooved brick pedestal. The bust is finely detailed, with textured hair and defined facial features, and is slightly tilted forward, giving it a contemplative expression. The pedestal is constructed from stacked, reddish-brown bricks with visible mortar lines, providing a strong contrast to the smooth, pale bust above. The sculpture appears weathered, with some surface irregularities and discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements. The overall form is compact and solid, with the bust and pedestal forming a unified vertical structure. The object is evocative of public art installations commonly found in parks, plazas, or near historical sites.
description: A classical white bust of a young male atop a grooved brick pedestal, with detailed hair and facial features, showing signs of weathering.
description_view_0: Left profile of the bust, showing the textured hair and the forward tilt of the head, with the brick pedestal clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head and neck, as well as the full width and texture of the brick pedestal.
description_view_2: Right profile of the bust, displaying the facial features and the side of the brick pedestal.
description_view_3: Frontal view of the bust, focusing on the face and upper torso, with the brick pedestal directly beneath.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible, but the sculpture is suited for outdoor urban or park environments.
